review: Todd came out to give our caravan a habitation check today. It was a very punctual, efficient and friendly service. Todd took time to explain his findings and even showed me how to work bits of the caravan I wasn't sure about. Email communication was great too.

Todd carried out a habitation check on our motorhome today. The service he provided was excellent. He was efficient, thorough and professional and communicated all his findings very clearly. He identified areas where the vehicle required updating to comply with safety regulations, and was able to provide and fit replacement parts as part of the service. Would have no hesitation in recommending this business.
owner_response: Thank you Karen, glad i could help!

review: Todd has been servicing our caravan for a few years now, and has carried out several repairs that needed doing. He always does a fab job, and is very fair with his recommendations. He’s a really lovely guy too, so he’s always a pleasure to see - even if I did forget to offer him a drink today. Sorry Todd!
owner_response: Thank you for the kind words Chris, and dont worry about the brew! See you next year.

review: What can i say, Prompt, courteous, professional, and most of all trustworthy, all of which is unfortunately hard to find these days. I would have no problem to recommend Country Caravan Care to anyone. Well done to Todd. From one happy customer.
Came highly recommended and provided an excellent service. Todd installed some solar panels on my caravan and sorted a pesky leak. Would definitely recommend Todd's services.

Todd Bowring from Country Caravan Care comes highly recommended! We had a last minute issue with our water pump prior to leaving for a four week motorhome trip. Todd came over and found the problem and fixed it up so that everything worked and we could leave for our trip. He didn't forget us either when we came back and has arranged a spare part so that we won't get this issue again. Great service!
owner_response: Thank you Trevor. Glad I could help you get away for your holiday!

review: Todd provided excellent service to us. He completed some minor repairs on our van conversion. From start to finish, he was reliable, courteous and helpful and kept us informed throughout the process. We wouldn’t hesitate to use him again.
owner_response: Thank you wendy, glad i could be of use!

review: Todd Bowring just saved our holiday. Three days from our scheduled departure and our mains lead failed. It’s on a cable reel, hidden away inside our Frankia motorhome. Todd managed to bypass it and fit a more conventional hook-up. Nice, clean installation and at a fair price. Well done, Todd!
owner_response: Thank you Robert, glad i could be of use!

review: The caravan was stranded on our drive after a caravan dealership incorrectly fitted a Reich motor mover too far away from the tyre. Todd arrived promptly, diagnosed the issue and refitted the mover correctly. I am really grateful for his help. Based on my experience I would have no hesitation in recommending Country Caravan Care.
owner_response: Thank you Hywel, really glad I could help 👍🏻

review: Very professional service today from Todd. I didn’t unfortunately get to meet in person, however he kept me fully informed of the service and has done me a good job. Also nice to be able to book next year's service in advance. Highly recommend.
owner_response: Thank you Marcus, hopefully I'll get to see you next year!

review: Excellent - previously carried out full service on my caravan, replaced kitchen tap and faulty door lock and now thank you again so much for rearranging your schedule today to come out urgently to repair our fridge. Highly recommend. Reliable, prompt, courteous.
owner_response: Thank you Ellen, happy I could help you

review: Prompt reliable and friendly service. Very knowledgeable and did a fantastic job. Highly recommend.
owner_response: Thank you John. Have a lovely holiday!

review: Todd did a top notch job for me. Highly recommend.
Superb customer service from Todd. Fitted new Kaart jockey wheel same day I rang so I could holiday and at a very fair price. 10/10.
Excellent service - really thorough inspection of our caravan and helped us to understand how it all worked as we are new to caravanning! Thank you for all your help Todd.
owner_response: Not a problem, glad I could be of use!

review: Expert and friendly service. Highly recommended.
As always very efficient in sorting a few issues on my motorhome. Thanks Todd.

owner_response: Thanks jack! Really appreciate the review
